# Landix UI - Component Registry

> Beautiful startup sections and components for shadcn/ui

## Project Structure

### Registry (`/registry`)
Distributable source code for components. Each component lives in its own directory with:
- `app/page.tsx` - Page entry point
- `components/` - Component implementations
- `lib/` - Data and utilities

### Preview (`/src/app/preview`)
UI-adapted versions of registry components for live preview.
Each preview mirrors its registry counterpart with enhanced styling.

### Documentation (`/src/app/(main-pages)/docs`)
Interactive documentation with live component previews.
Features taste-based filtering (Apple, Linear, AI design languages).

## Available Components

### Hero Sections
- **hero-01**: Classic hero with header, intro section, and partner logos
  - Registry: `/registry/hero-01/`
  - Preview: `/src/app/preview/hero-1/`
  
- **hero-02**: Gradient-focused hero with badge and CTA
  - Registry: `/registry/hero-02/`
  - Preview: `/src/app/preview/hero-2/`
  - Features: Motion animations, gradient text, sparkle icon
  
- **hero-03**: Two-column layout with social proof
  - Registry: `/registry/hero-03/`
  - Preview: `/src/app/preview/hero-3/`
  - Features: User avatars, star ratings, play button
  
- **hero-04**: Feature-focused hero with icon grid
  - Registry: `/registry/hero-04/`
  - Preview: `/src/app/preview/hero-4/`
  - Features: Three-column feature cards, gradient background

## Installation

Components use:
- React 19+
- Next.js 16+
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Motion (framer-motion fork)
- Lucide React (icons)

## Taste System

The docs feature a taste filter with three design languages:

- **Apple taste**: Premium, glass-morphic, sophisticated
- **Linear taste**: Minimal, clean, functional
- **AI taste**: Gradient-heavy, animated, futuristic

Each component adapts its visual style based on selected taste.

## Key Files

- `/src/contexts/TasteContext.tsx` - Taste state management
- `/src/data/category.ts` - Documentation categories
- `/src/components/docs/Hero.tsx` - Hero documentation component
- `/src/components/playground/ComponentPlayground.tsx` - Live preview playground

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Registry Build

```bash
npm run registry:build
```

This generates distributable component packages from `/registry`.
